profile.name: Jesynta Harya
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer & Designer
profile.bio: I craft beautiful digital experiences that blend elegant code with stunning visuals. Passionate about building products that make a difference.

projects.title: IT Audit Management System
projects.description: Built a web application that helps auditors, auditees, and companies assess risks, manage audit evidence, and generate reports. The system classifies risks into High, Medium, and Low categories and incorporates an AI assistant that enables users to query and analyze audit reports for faster and more informed decision-making.

projects.title: Secure File Sharing System
projects.description: End-to-end data pipeline and visualization dashboard for e-commerce metrics. Processes 10M+ records daily with sub-second query times.

projects.title: Orbit UI Library
projects.description: A premium React component library with 80+ accessible, animated components. Used by 500+ developers worldwide.

projects.title: CloudSync API
projects.description: Multi-cloud file synchronization REST API supporting AWS, GCP, and Azure. Handles concurrent uploads with conflict resolution.

projects.title: TaskFlow Pro
projects.description: Project management tool with AI-powered task prioritization, time tracking, and team collaboration features.

projects.title: CryptoTracker Live
projects.description: Real-time cryptocurrency portfolio tracker with price alerts, technical analysis charts, and portfolio analytics.

timeline.title: Mental Health Brand Ambassador
timeline.description: Joined as a brand ambassador, helping raise awareness, organize student wellness activities, and foster support.

timeline.title: Built IT Audit Management System
timeline.description: Developed a full-stack risk assessment tool with FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, and an AI report analyzer assistant.

timeline.title: B.Sc. in Information Technology
timeline.description: Studying at President University. Actively participating in software projects and coding challenges.
